hero.title: Experience AI Chatbots in Action
hero.description: Don't take our word for it — try them yourself. Three live demos showing what AI chatbots can do for your business.

customer_service.title: Customer Service
customer_service.description: Handle 70% of customer inquiries automatically — instant responses, 24/7 availability.

lead_qualification.title: Lead Qualification
lead_qualification.description: Score and route leads around the clock. Never miss a hot prospect again.

appointment_booking.title: Appointment Booking
appointment_booking.description: Fill your calendar without manual back-and-forth. Integrated with Calendly, Cal.com, and more.

faq_automation.title: FAQ Automation
faq_automation.description: Consistent, accurate answers — always available. Trained on your specific knowledge base.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We map your use case, identify key intents, and plan integration with your existing tools.

build.title: Build
build.description: Custom LLM-powered chatbot, trained on your data. Multi-platform deployment ready.

optimize.title: Optimize
optimize.description: Ongoing improvement based on real conversation data. Monthly performance reports.

platforms.q: What platforms can you deploy chatbots on?
platforms.a: We deploy on websites (widget), WhatsApp, Slack, Discord, Facebook Messenger, and any platform with an API.

training.a: We train on your existing documentation, FAQs, product info, and past support conversations. The bot learns your specific domain and brand voice.

handoff.q: Can the chatbot hand off to a human agent?
handoff.a: Yes. Smart escalation routes complex queries to your team via email, Slack, or your helpdesk tool — with full conversation context.

privacy.a: We follow GDPR best practices. Your data stays in your infrastructure. We can deploy models that run entirely on your own servers if required.

demo.title: Try It Yourself
demo.subtitle: Interact with 4 live AI chatbot demos — each trained for a different use case.
demo.cta_subtle_link: We build custom chatbots for your business
demo.cta_strong: Ready to get your own AI chatbot? Book a free strategy session.
demo.cta_gate_description: You've explored the demo — now imagine this tailored to your business. Book a call to experience the full version.

ecommerce.label: E-commerce Advisor
ecommerce.scenario: You're browsing a premium skincare webshop. The AI advisor helps you find the right products for your skin type, builds personalized routines, and answers ingredient questions.

leadgen.label: Lead Qualifier
leadgen.scenario: A potential client visits your marketing agency website. The AI qualifier engages them, identifies their needs, scores their fit, and routes hot leads to your sales team.

support.label: Support Agent
support.scenario: A customer needs help with their order or account. The AI support agent resolves common issues instantly, looks up order status, and escalates complex cases to your team.
capabilities: Look up order and account info

concierge.label: Website Concierge
concierge.scenario: A visitor lands on your website for the first time. The AI concierge greets them, answers questions about your services, shares case studies, and guides them toward booking a discovery call — like a 24/7 sales assistant.
capabilities: Navigate visitors to the right page

multi_platform.title: One Brain, Every Channel
multi_platform.subtitle: Train once, deploy everywhere. The same AI assistant adapts its behavior per platform.

shopify.name: Shopify Store
shopify.behavior: Sales-focused, recommends products, builds routines, adds to cart

whatsapp.name: WhatsApp Business
whatsapp.behavior: Quick support, order status, appointment reminders

multi_platform.case_study: Real case: SkinClarity Club uses one AI assistant across their website AND Shopify store. Same knowledge, different behavior per platform.

final_cta.title: Get a Free Chatbot Strategy Session
final_cta.description: We'll analyze your use case and show you exactly how an AI chatbot can save your team hours every week.
